data.title: ADT Inc. Data Breach: Edelson Lechtzin LLP Launches Investigation Into Exposure of Personal Information
data.description: A nationwide law firm specializing in class action cases, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, is currently providing complimentary case assessments for individuals affected by the recent cybersecurity breach involving ADT Inc. This incident has led to data privacy concerns, prompting the firm to look into potential legal actions. The firm based in Boca Raton, Florida, made this announcement on April 27, 2026. People impacted by the ADT Inc. breach are encouraged to seek assistance from Edelson Lechtzin LLP for legal advice and guidance on potential claims relating to the cybersecurity issue.

data.title: Greenland Energy Announces Pricing of $70 Million Public Offering
data.description: Houston-based Greenland Energy Company (Nasdaq: GLND) has revealed plans to responsibly develop hydrocarbon resources in Greenland, focusing on the Jameson Land Basin. The energy exploration company has recently announced the pricing for its latest project.
